description: Cockpit environment-health panel surfacing `compose doctor` (dep/version drift) and `compose hooks status` (stale/foreign/missing git hooks). Silent hook and version drift currently causes mystery build failures with zero UI signal. Read-only panel backed by a thin /api/health endpoint wrapping the existing doctor/hooks-status logic.

completions.notes: Cockpit environment-health panel: read-only /api/environment-health + header dot+popover surfacing compose doctor + hooks status. Full suite green (node 3977, UI 429, tracker 100); Codex review clean.
